name: @quoin/tokens-heroui
description: HeroUI (formerly NextUI) default palette translated onto the Quoin canonical semantic-token namespace.

attribution.harvestNotes: HeroUI semantic colour tokens from packages/core/theme/src/colors/semantic.ts. Extraction method: A. Mapping: HeroUI's semantic palette flattened onto base.heroui.{name}. Default light theme: background = white, foreground = neutral-900 (zinc-style), primary = purple-ish #7828c8 per HeroUI's brand.
